name: The Crew: The Quest for Planet Nine
description: The Crew: The Quest for Planet Nine is Thomas Sing's Kennerspiel-des-Jahres-2020-winning cooperative trick-taker — a four-suit deck plus a black rocket trump suit, a deep-space mission campaign that ramps up across fifty scenarios, and a small set of communication tokens that let crew members reveal exactly one card-relationship per round. Win every assigned trick or the mission fails. The original space-mission masterclass.
